data.title: Enterprises Align AI and Data Platforms to Scale AI Deployments with Accuracy, Compliance, ISG says
data.description: A report from ISG reveals that companies in Stamford, Conn. are aligning AI and data initiatives while implementing AI for operations relying on data from across their enterprises. This strategy aims to streamline processes and improve decision-making. This coordination is seen as crucial for successfully integrating AI technologies, with companies leveraging data from various sources within their organizations. The move signifies a growing trend towards harnessing AI capabilities for enhanced efficiency and effectiveness in business functions.

data.title: Forrester: Three Years Into GenAI, Enterprises Are Still Chasing Its True Transformative Value
data.description: In Cambridge, Massachusetts, Forrester (Nasdaq: FORR) has released a new report titled "Accelerate Your AI Voyage," revealing that a majority of enterprises are facing challenges in translating increased AI adoption and investment into concrete business outcomes. The primary issue hindering progress is the low artificial intelligence quotient (AIQ), a metric used by Forrester to gauge AI proficiency, as numerous employees lack the necessary comprehension on leveraging AI effectively. Additionally, businesses are impeded by an inclination towards productivity-driven AI applications.

data.title: Edgecore Networks Announces Sponsorship of Beyond Summit 2026 with TensorWave; Showcases Next-Generation 102.4T Open Networking for AI Infrastructure
data.description: In Hsinchu, Taiwan, Edgecore Networks, a subsidiary of Accton Group and a prominent provider of open networking solutions, shared news of their sponsorship for the Beyond Summit 2026 event to be held in San Francisco on April 8. The company will unveil its new high-performance switching lineup tailored to address the substantial bandwidth requirements of generative AI and extensive GPU clusters. With the transition towards a post-"Beyond CUDA" landscape, the focus is on infrastructure adaptability to accommodate these advanced technologies.

data.title: Wunderkind Launches New Braze Integration to Turn Identity Into Revenue-Driving, Orchestrated Customer Journeys
data.description: In New York, Wunderkind, an AI decisioning platform, has revealed a new integration with Braze, a top customer engagement platform. This collaboration aims to enhance performance and expand reach for marketers. Through this integration, marketers can now identify a higher percentage of their website visitors, utilize real-time behavioral signals, and effectively organize targeted campaigns. The integration combines Wunderkind's identity resolution with Braze's capabilities to enable more personalized and engaging interactions between brands and consumers.

data.title: Pyth Network Enables Launch of Traditional Asset Markets on Polymarket
data.description: In BAAR, Switzerland, Pyth Network, a prominent institutional market data provider, revealed its integration with Polymarket, the world's largest prediction market. Pyth will serve as the resolution source for a range of traditional asset markets introduced by the collaboration. This partnership debuts with various markets such as daily up/down and daily close for significant equity indices and commodities like Gold, Silver, WTI crude, and natural gas. Additionally, it includes over twelve single-name U.S. equities, offering a new suite of options for traders.

data.title: Papa Johns Launches “Pizza Miles,” Reimbursing Customers for Gas When They Drive for Carryout
data.description: In Atlanta, Papa Johns is introducing a new limited-time promotion called Pizza Miles, which rewards customers with Papa Dough for choosing carryout. This promotion is part of the Papa Rewards® program and aims to enhance customer loyalty. Whether customers are making a quick stop for pizza or heading out for a Friday night dinner, Pizza Miles adds value by giving back Papa Dough. This initiative encourages customers to prioritize carryout to earn rewards and enjoy their favorite pizzas without worrying about transportation costs.

data.title: Guide Dogs for the Blind Launches Advocacy Month in April to Celebrate Progress Made in Disability Rights
data.description: In San Rafael, California, Guide Dogs for the Blind (GDB) has announced April as its first Advocacy Month, aimed at highlighting advancements in disability rights, raising awareness among the public, and engaging its community. Throughout the month, GDB is hosting a variety of events to promote inclusivity by addressing barriers and increasing knowledge about legislation that enhances accessibility for all. The initiative seeks to empower individuals to contribute towards a more inclusive society by educating them on essential legal provisions and promoting disability inclusion.

data.title: CUPE members preparing for province-wide action after negotiations stall at the Extendicare Central Table
data.description: In Markham, Ontario, negotiations between CUPE and Extendicare management have hit a standstill, prompting members of CUPE's central negotiation table to plan for upcoming action this summer. Discussions took place at CUPE's Ontario Regional office regarding a new collective agreement for eight CUPE Extendicare locals. CUPE, representing more than 30,000 Long-Term Care and Retirement Home employees in the province, has been setting the bargaining trend for other unions in this sector.

data.title: MNA: Baystate Franklin Nurses to Hold Informational Picket April 7 as Community Supports Fight for Patient Safety and Keeping Care Local
data.description: In Franklin County, nurses are advocating for safe staffing levels, competitive wages, and contractual safeguards to maintain local care. The registered nurses at Baystate Franklin Medical Center (BFMC) in GREENFIELD, Mass., are pushing for these measures. On April 2, 2026, they highlighted their plea for regionally competitive salaries and other protections to ensure quality care.

data.title: Khloe Kardashian's Khloud Snack Brand Launches Khloud Protein Chips
data.description: A popular functional snack brand has unveiled its second product line after the widespread popularity of Khloud Protein Popcorn. The brand, Khloud, founded by Khloé Kardashian, revealed the introduction of Khloud Protein. The announcement was made on April 2, 2026, in Los Angeles.

data.title: Tokenized U.S. Treasuries valued at $12.78B are gaining traction as collateral for institutional trading workflows.
data.description: The value of tokenized U.S. Treasuries onchain has exceeded $12.78 billion. The attention is now on utilizing this value as collateral effectively in institutional trading processes, moving beyond just issuance.

data.title: Clarity Act Could Pass Within 48 Hours, Says Coinbase Exec
data.description: Coinbase's Chief Legal Officer, Paul Grewal, expressed optimism about the Clarity Act, suggesting progress within 48 hours. Grewal mentioned being close to a deal, emphasizing the bill's importance in realizing President Trump's goal for the US to become the global crypto hub. The legislation has faced challenges since January, with industry stakeholders struggling to reach consensus. Grewal believes the deadlock may be easing, especially as polls indicate potential losses for Republicans in the upcoming midterm elections. If Democrats regain the House, legislative efforts could stall until 2028. More details on the story can be found on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Sundial Media & Technology Group Appoints Amanda Butler as First Chief Marketing Officer
data.description: In major cities like New York and Los Angeles, Sundial Media & Technology Group (SMTG) has recently announced the appointment of Amanda Butler as their inaugural Chief Marketing Officer. SMTG, known for being a human connections platform and the owner of popular brands such as ESSENCE and Refinery29, selected Butler to spearhead the merging and advancement of marketing tactics throughout SMTG's range of businesses. Butler will be in charge of various key areas including Consumer Marketing, Communications, Creative Strategy, Insights, and the transformation of Content Production into a comprehensive studio. This move signifies a significant step in enhancing the marketing efforts within the company.

data.title: Gillette Launches New GilletteLabs Body Razor, Setting a New Standard for Men’s Body Grooming
data.description: Gillette has introduced the GilletteLabs Body razor, branded as their safest body razor to date, targeting men's body grooming needs. It is noted that despite the notable differences between facial and body hair and skin, a survey reveals that 70% of men resort to the same razor for both purposes. With this in view, the GilletteLabs Body razor is crafted to handle the distinct challenges encountered during body grooming while also aiming to alleviate the primary concerns men encounter in the process.
